name: WFBE_NEURODEF_FORT_CHECKPOINT
notes: ROADBLOCK / CHECKPOINT (fortification, side-neutral, 0 gun-AI). Designed to sit ACROSS a road (road runs +Y through the position). Soldier logic: concrete barriers are staggered left/right to force any vehicle into a slow single-file chicane instead of a straight run — it cannot be rushed. A gate bar marks the stop line. On EACH side of the chicane a bag-fence firing position gives the guards protected cover with arcs onto the stopped vehicle and onto the approach, mutually supporting across the road. A camo-netted checkpoint shelter/ammo point sits behind cover to the rear. Hedgehogs on the shoulders stop anyone bypassing off-road; wire ties the obstacle into the terrain. The stop line faces the threat approach (+Y); the friendly rear (-Y) is left open to drive through once cleared.

objs.role: left guard position — cover, arc onto the stop line
right guard position — cover, mutually supports left
checkpoint shelter / ammo point — behind cover, rear
left shoulder trap — stops off-road bypass
right shoulder trap — stops off-road bypass
checkpoint warning sign — faces the approach
wire — ties left shoulder to terrain
wire — ties right shoulder to terrain
